title: Unrelated Fragments
description: A sequence of everyday fragments that should largely remain unrelated, with little or no hypothesis creation.

rounds.prompt: I need to replace the cracked protector on my phone.
I always end up buying the sour gummies and then pretending I only wanted one bag.
I had another airport dream where I missed the gate even though I was already in the building.
Cleaning the kitchen sink is the one chore that makes the whole room feel reset immediately.

assertions.reason: Two clearly unrelated prompts should not have created a theory bridge.

finalAssertions.reason: Unrelated fragments should not produce hypothesis notes by default.
The agent should preserve separateness when there is no meaningful overlap.
